### Props

| Name          | Type       | Required | Default                                                | Description                                                                                         |
| ------------- | ---------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`       | `string`   |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Metadata')`              | Widget title shown in the card header                                                               |
| `icon`        | `object    | func`    |                                                        | `null`                                                                                              | Optional MDI icon component for the header                                |
| `objectData`  | `object`   | ✓        | —                                                      | The object data containing metadata. Supports flat objects and objects with `@self` metadata block. |
| `layout`      | `string`   |          | `'horizontal'`                                         | Layout mode for the grid: 'grid' or 'horizontal'.                                                   |
| `columns`     | `number`   |          | `0`                                                    | Number of grid columns (only for layout='grid').                                                    |
| `labelWidth`  | `number`   |          | `150`                                                  | Min width for labels in horizontal layout.                                                          |
| `extraItems`  | `union`    |          | `[]`                                                   | Additional metadata items to display.                                                               |
| `include`     | `string[]  | null`    |                                                        | `null`                                                                                              | Metadata fields to include (whitelist). If null, all available are shown. |
| `exclude`     | `string[]` |          | `[]`                                                   | Metadata fields to exclude.                                                                         |
| `collapsible` | `boolean`  |          | `false`                                                | Whether the card can be collapsed                                                                   |
| `collapsed`   | `boolean`  |          | `false`                                                | Initial collapsed state                                                                             |
| `emptyLabel`  | `string`   |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No metadata available')` | Label shown when no metadata available                                                              |
